# platformAddEdgeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformAddEdgeAndSave

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformAddEdgeAndSaveMutation(); mutate({ input: '<PlatformAddEdgeAndSaveInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformAddEdgeAndSaveMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformAddEdgeAndSaveMutation();

```
